title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Vijaya Diagnostics South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Vijaya Diagnostics South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Radiologist with drive and ambition, Vijaya Diagnostics South Asia Partners in Allahabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Vijaya Diagnostics South Asia Partners:
Vijaya Diagnostics South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vijaya Diagnostics South Asia Partners!
